topics.title: Introduction to Algorithms
topics.summary: Introduction to the course and instructor

topics.title: Definition of Algorithm
topics.summary: Algorithm is a finite set of statements that guarantees an optimal solution in a finite interval of time

topics.title: Algorithmic Thinking and Problem-Solving
topics.summary: Algorithmic thinking and problem-solving skills are vital for making efficient solutions

topics.title: Characteristics of Algorithm
topics.summary: Algorithm is a finite set of instructions or logic to accomplish a task

topics.title: Representation of Algorithm
topics.summary: Algorithm can be expressed in different languages, mathematical notations, and graphical notations

topics.title: Example of Algorithm
topics.summary: Example of an algorithm using flowchart and pseudocode
topics.technical_details:
1. Set number to 1
2. Set sum to 0
3. Loop until number reaches 100
4. Add number to sum
5. Increment number by 1

topics.title: Conclusion
topics.summary: Algorithm can be represented in different ways, including pseudocode and flowcharts
